Serve in small cups fortified with a jigger (1 1/2 ounces) of peppermint schnapps and a dollop of whipped cream.
Add a peppermint stick to stir.
If transporting in a thermos, heat thermos up with hot water to get it warm for 1 minute. Pour water out and fill with hot chocolate.

similar.name: Candy Cane Hot Cocoa Mix - Gift

name: Peppermint Mocha Mix
directions: Mix together first four ingredients.  I use a potato masher to get all the lumps out.
Put the starlight mints into a freezer bag and smash.  I use a rubber mallet from my tool box!  This is a great holiday stress reliever :).
When they're mainly powder with a few little pieces of mint, add them to the mix and stir well.
When ready to enjoy around three heaping teaspoons per cup will do.  I use half milk and half water when preparing.
They look great in a little mason jar with a ribbon!

name: French Vanilla Mocha
directions: Combine water and coffee granules in large mug; stir until coffee is dissolved.
Stir in coffee creamer and chocolate syrup and top with whipped cream.

name: Retro Russian  Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients and put into a sealed jar. The longer it sets, the better it gets.
To serve, use 2 teaspoons of tea mix to a cup of boiling water.  Add 1 teaspoon rum and enjoy!

name: Starbucks Peppermint Mocha
directions: Combine 3 Tbsp Baking Cocoa with 3 Tbsp warm water to make into a rich syrup. Pour into a 16 ounce mug.
Add espresso
Add Peppermint syrup.
Steam milk and add to remainder of cup.
Garnish with whipped cream and sugar crystals.

Note: To make espresso (for 2 servings of this recipe) for those who do not know how, follow the directions below. Don't let the thought scare you it is almost as easy as making regular american coffee- it just takes a little practice:
Buy a $30 machine (Mr. Coffee ECM250 is good).
Put water into carafe up to band and put into machine.
Put coffee (any kind of finely ground) into filter head and pack down well.
Turn on and brew until carafe fills to 4 cup line that way there is still enough water in machine to steam milk.
Switch to steam mode and steam milk (if you do not have a frothing pitcher a 12 oz ceramic mug will work filled half way with milk but takes 2 fill ups to make one serving of this recipe).
Follow recipe and enjoy!

name: Iced Coffee With Ice Coffee Cubes
directions: Brew regular strength coffee and freeze it in ice cube trays.
Fill tall glasses with the coffee cubes and pour regular strength coffee over them.
Add sugar or cream if desired.

name: Holiday Bliss Cocktail (By the Pitcher)
directions: Mix all in a pitcher
Serve over ice.

name: Mint Limeade
directions: In 12-ounce glass, muddle mint and honey syrup for about 8 seconds.
Add ice and lime juice, then fill with club soda.
Stir well and serve.
Honey Syrup:

In heavy medium saucepan over medium heat, stir together honey and water until honey dissolves. Increase heat slightly, then simmer 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Refrigerate syrup until cold, about 2 hours. (Can be prepared 1 week ahead. Cover and keep refrigerated.).

name: Ice Cream Parlor Coffee Mocha Sodas
directions: Place very hot water in a med-sized pitcher & stir in coffee (finely ground to a powder texture) until dissolved.
Stir in milk.
Place 1 scoop of ice cream in each of 4 ice cream soda glasses.
Pour coffee/milk mixture equally into each glass.
Fill glasses almost to brim w/club soda.
Top w/sweetened whipping cream or prepared whipped topping.

name: Coffee Mocha Frosteds
directions: Place hot coffee & chocolate syrup in blender container, blend till smooth & cool to room temperature.
Pour cooled mixture into a med howl. Add softened ice cream & cold coffee.
W/rotary beater, beat till smooth, spoon into tall glasses & serve immediately.
NOTE: I entered the prep as written, but assume an immersion blender will be equally efficient for the prep.

similar.name: Ice Cream Parlor Coffee Mocha Sodas

name: Mocha Mint Coffee
directions: Combine coffee, ice cream & creme de menthe in blender container & blend on low speed.
Spoon into sherbet or wine glasses & garnish ea serving w/a chocolate mint wafer or shaved chocolate.

name: Carameltini
directions: Put all ingredients in a cocktail shaker and shake to combine and chill.
Strain into martini glass.

name: Amarula Cream Gumdrop
directions: Combine Amarula, cream and schnapps in a shaker with ice. Shake until cold.
Strain into a cocktail glass and pour a dash of blue curacao down two opposite sides of the glass using a teaspoon.

name: Butterscotch Amarula Cream
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour Amarula Cream Liqueur, Butterscotch Schnapps, and skim milk over ice, stir and ENJOY.

name: Milky Way Cappuccino
directions: Mix coffee and syrups together in a mug.
Fill with steamed milk.
Add a bit of foamed milk on top.

name: Chocolate Peppermint Tea
directions: Microwave water in a mug until hot. Place tea bag in hot water and steep for a few minutes. Discard tea bag.
Stir in chocolate syrup, splenda and creamer.
Pour over crushed ice in a tall glass if desired.
Top with whipped cream and drizzled chocolate syrup.

name: Summer Love Tea
directions: Bring 1 cup water and juice to a boil.
Stir in honey and cinnamon.
Add the tea bags.
Remove from heat.
Let stand for one hour.
Add 6 cups cold water Pour into glasses with ice.
Sit back, sip and fall in love.
Can be stored in the refrigerator for three days.

name: Axtec Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat the milk, vanilla, cinnamon & nutmeg in a saucepan over medium heat - do not allow to boil.
Mix cocoa, sugar & corn starch in a small bowl with a few drops of cold milk.
Stir into the hot milk and allow to thicken over low heat.
Remove pod & stick, pour milk into individual cups and garnish with almonds.

name: Boozy Chocolate Martini
directions: In a pitcher, stir together the half-and-half or light cream, chocolate liqueur, and vodka.
Place ice cubes in a martini shaker. Add liqueur mixture; shake. Strain mixture into four to six chilled martini glasses.

name: Brandy Alexander
directions: In a blender, combine all the ingredients.
Blend until smooth.
Garnish with nutmeg.

name: X-Rated Iced Tea (Long Island)
directions: Combine all ingredients into an ice filled shaker.
Shake over ice, strain into a highball glass filled with crushed ice.
Garnish with an orange twist or other fruit on the rim.
Enjoy! ;).

similar.name: Long Island Iced Tea (Applebee's/TGI Friday's style)

name: Chocolate Espresso Martini
directions: Wipe the rim of a chilled, oversized martini glass with lemon wedge.
Pour sugar and chocolate into a saucer and mix well.
Dip glass rim in mixture and roll to thoroughly coat rim.
Over a large handful of ice in a cocktail shaker, pour espresso, vodka, and creme de cacao. Shake until frothy. Strain into prepared glass. Garnish rim with a twist and stand back.

name: Bailey's Beach Baby
directions: Combine the ingredients with ice in a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously until foamy.
Serve in glass with or without ice.

name: Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients together and store in an airtight container.
To make hot cocoa use 1/3 cup mix and 8 oz of hot or boiling water.
Enjoy!

name: Lemon Verbena Drink
directions: Bring water to a boil and remove from heat.
Add lemon verbena, mint and honey.
Infuse for 10 minutes, then strain.
Cool and serve over ice.

name: Delicious Russian Tea
directions: Mix together well and store in a jar.
Add 2 tsp of mix to 1 cup hot water.

name: Crimson Royale
directions: Measure 2 tablespoons cranberry concentrate, 1 teaspoon cranberry liqueur and 1 teaspoon orange liqueur into each of 6 champagne flutes.
Top with champagne.

name: Bailey's Irish Coffee
directions: Combine coffee and Bailey's Irish Cream.
Top with whipped cream and serve.
Makes 1 serving.

name: Chocolate Cocoa Deluxe
directions: In a small saucepan combine water and chocolate; cook and stir just until boiling. Remove from heat; stir in liqueur or vanilla.
In a small chilled mixing bowl beat cream with an electric mixer on low to medium speed until soft peaks form (tips curl).
Top each serving of cocoa with whipped cream; sprinkle with orange peel, if desired.

name: Mocha Au Lait  Mix
directions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine creamer, brown sugar, coffee crystals, and chocolate pieces.
Package prettily for giving or store mixture in a tightly covered container.
Mixing Instructions:
pour 2/3 cup boiling water in a blender container.
Add 1/4 cup of the mix.
Cover tightly; blend until well combined and frothy, (Or beat with a wire whisk or electric mixer).
Pour into a mug.
If desired, top with shaved chocolate.
Makes 2 cups mix.

similar.name: Orange Cafe Au Lait Mix- Gift in a Jar

name: Creamy Iced Vanilla Caramel Coffee
directions: Place all ingredients into blender and blend on high until the ice is completely smooth. Pour into four glasses and top with a dollop of whipped cream.
Serve immediately.

name: Vegan Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat milk in the microwave (or on stove). Get it just a little hotter than drinkable. Stirring once or twice is a good idea.
Stir the cocoa and sugar into the warm water in a small container to dissolve sugar. Pour this into the mug of hot milk. Enjoy after skating, sliding, or a frosty white walk!

similar.name: Vegan Hot Cocoa - No Dairy or Soy

name: Kahlua
directions: Simmer sugar, water and coffee slowly, for an hour.
Cool.
Stir in vanilla and vodka.
Store in refrigerator in bottles for at least a month.
Serve over ice.

name: Blended Baileys
directions: Drop 2 large ice cubes into your blender
Add 50ml of Baileys per person
Blend until completely smooth
Pour into your tall glasses.
Pretty good huh?.
Tips:
Ideally use a good blender with ice crushing capability - if your blender’s not so hot then add a little water to the ice cubes and blend until they’re crushed.
If your blender has one, use the pulse setting for 10 seconds - it will stop the uncrushed ice collecting at the top
And don’t overblend! Otherwise you’ll end up with slush.

similar.name: Irish Cream Recipe (Taste Matched to Baileys)

name: Baileys Irish Martini
directions: Drop some ice cubes into a shaker
Pour in Baileys
Add  the Irish Whiskey
Add coffee
Shake vigorously
Serve in a Martini glass.

similar.name: Irish Cream Recipe (Taste Matched to Baileys)

name: Baileys Chocolatini
directions: Drop several ice cubes into a shaker.
Add Baileys.
Add vodka and  chocolate liqueur.
Shake together.
Strain drink into a chilled Martini glass.
Garnish your Martini with chocolate shavings or chocolate flake.
If you don’t have chocolate then try a sprinkling of cocoa powder or hot chocolate powder.
If you don’t have either then don’t worry, this drink is so chocolaty you’ll find it hard to improve!

name: Liquid Caramel
directions: Pour the Bailey's irish cream, Kahlua coffee liqueur and butterscotch schnapps into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes. Shake quickly, and strain into a highball glass.
Top with milk, stir well and serve.

name: Cafè Baileys
directions: combine the ingredients together in a mug glass.
Top with whip cream if desired.

name: The Big O
directions: Shake ingredients and serve over ice.

name: Butter Shot
directions: Shake the ingredients together with ice in a cocktail shaker.
strain into a cordial glass.

name: Corey's Oatmeal Cookie Drink
directions: Pour Bailey's irish cream and butterscotch schnapps into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice cubes.
Add a couple of dashes of cinnamon.
Shake well, and strain into a cocktail glass.
Dust wth cinnamon, and serve.

name: Sunny Irishman
directions: Fill a mug most of the way with hot coffee. Stir in orange liqueur and Irish whiskey, to taste.
Add a heaping dollop of whipped cream and drizzle with creme de menthe.

similar.name: French Toddy (For Kate and French Tart)

name: Roasted Toasted Almond
directions: Using a shaker filled with ice, combine all ingredients. Shake well.
Strain into a chilled old-fashioned glass.

name: Alouette Ice
directions: Put all ingredients in a shaker and shake well.
Serve in a tall glass with straw.

name: Nutty Angel
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice.
Strain into a chilled martini glass.
Dust with nutmeg.

name: Chocolate Spice Tea
directions: Microwave water in a mug until hot.
Place tea bag in hot water and steep for a few minutes until strong. Discard tea bag.
Stir in chocolate syrup, Splenda and creamer. Reheat if desired.
Pour over crushed ice in a tall glass if desired.
Top with whipped cream and drizzled chocolate syrup.

name: Iced Tea
directions: Place tea bags in a 6 cup tea pot.
Add boiling water and steep for 15 minute.
Pour steeped tea into pitcher.
Add sugar and stir to dissolve.
Add lemons.
Fill pitcher with cold water to taste.
Putting in fridge makes ice tea cloudy so I just add ice to a glass and pour in tea.

similar.name: Southern Sweet Iced Tea, Hotel Style

name: Brandy Alexander
directions: Combine brandy, crème de cacao, and heavy cream in a shaker with ice and shake vigorously.
Strain into a 6-ounce cocktail glass and grate nutmeg over top, to taste.

name: Bailey's Express
directions: Combine ingredients in a shaker of ice.
Pour into a martini glass; garnish if desired.
Enjoy! ;).

name: Coffee Malted
directions: Transfer the coffee to a small bowl and put it in the freezer just until it starts to turn icy at the edge, about 20 minutes. Stir, but leave it in the freezer for several more minutes, until you’re ready to use it.
While you’re at it, chill two tall drink glasses.
Put the milk, malted milk powder, and coffee ice cream in your blender.
Add the chilled coffee.
If you like your malted on the sweet side, add a tablespoon or two of the sugar.
Blend on medium speed to the desired consistency, then pour into the chilled glasses and serve.

name: Fluffy Hot Chocolate
directions: Heat milk in a saucepan until just starting to boil.
Add milk chocolate chips and stir until melted.
Pour into 4 large mugs, top each with a spoonful of marshmallow creme and stir until creme is mostly melted and hot chocolate is very creamy.

similar.name: Heaven in a Cup Hot Chocolate

name: Autumn-Holiday Coffee
directions: Brew a pot of your favorite coffee, a little too strong.
In a small pan, add 1 1/2 cup water, 4-7 cloves, the cinnamon stick broken up, 4-7 whole cardamom - split the tips, and 4 teaspoons of sugar.
Heat up to boiling then reduce to simmer for 3-4 minutes .
Mix the coffee and the spice-mix, pour into cups top with whipped cream and sprinkle with chocolate and cinnamon.
Add more sugar if desired.
This also makes a great drink with some Kahlua or brandy, for a more adult evening drink.

name: Werther's Caramel Martini
directions: Mix Bailey's Caramel Irish Cream and Vodka in a shaker with ice.
Strain in a martini glass and add half and half.

name: Butterscotch  Ride
directions: ***Blend ingredients in a blender with 4-5 ice cubes until ice is well crushed.
Drizzle caramel inside a chilled tall glass. Add ingredients and serve with a straw.

name: Vanilla Creamsicle
directions: Mix all ingredients together, except cream. to be shaken, not stirred
pour into a large glass
add a splash of cream.
garnish with an orange peel, if desired.

name: Champagne Hula
directions: Shake Rum, Grand Marnier, pineapple juice and grenadine with ice.
Strain into a champagne glass and fill up with champagne.
Garnish with a strawberry slice on the rim.

name: Vodka Espresso
directions: Method:.
Shake coffee, Vodka and sugar together with cubed ice, strain into glass,.
layer Amarula on top.

name: Vanilla Cream Shooter
directions: Layer all ingredients in a glass,.
Amaretto first, then the Amarula, then the vodka.

name: Amarula Day Dream
directions: Shake the Amarula and milk with ice and strain into a highball glass.
Add cola and stir gently.

name: Amarula Café De Cocoa
directions: Pour the hot chocolate, hot black coffee and Butterscotch Schnapps into a latte style coffee glass.
Add the Amarula Cream to the top and stir gently.

name: Yummiest Iced Coffee (Like Bottled Frappuccino)
directions: The order you do this in is important.  In a very large glass, preferably 24 - 26 oz, mix hot water, coffee and sugar (or caramel topping) until dissolved.
Add the ice cubes and stir vigorously for about a minute until the hot water has cooled.
Add the evaporated milk and then top off the glass with the remaining milk and stir well.

similar.name: Low-Cal Iced Coffee With Milk (Cafe Au Lait)

name: Iced Mocha Very Light
directions: Using a drip coffeemaker, add the water and ground coffee and brew.
Pour coffee into a glass measuring cup. Stir in milk and drink mix.
Serve coffee mixture over ice in chilled tall glasses.

name: Dead Mary Cocktail
directions: In a tumbler-type crystal glass 2/3 filled with ice cubes, pour in the vodka and squeeze the lime slice over the ice and drop it inches.
Add the ice cold V-8 juice and stir in the Worcestershire sauce (if using). Garnish with the celery rib, impale the olives on a toothpick to garnish the top, and serve.
For vegetarian omit the Worcestershire sauce or use a vegetarian one.

name: Another Southern Iced Tea
directions: In a 2 qt pot, bring about 5 cups of water to a full boil.
Add the four family size tea bags and remove from heat.
Set your timer for 5 minutes (and 5 minutes ONLY!).
During this time add sugar to gallon sized tea pitcher.
When 5 minutes are up, add tea to sugar in pitcher and press gently on tea bags to remove left in liquid and stir. Discard tea bags.
While stirring, add rest of water to pitcher filling to about two or three inches from top. (watching color, I do about three inches from top.
Pour over a tall glass of ice and enjoy the goodness!

name: Failproof Iced Tea
directions: Bring water just to a boil but DO NOT BOIL.
Add baking soda and tea bags.
Remove from heat  Cover.
Steep 10-15 minutes.
Pour into a gallon pitcher.
Add sugar (you can add an additional 1/3 cup, if desired).
Stir well.
Fill with cold water and refrigerate.
Adding the baking soda prevents any bitterness and darkens the tea.

similar.name: Southern Sweet Iced Tea, Hotel Style

name: Frosted
directions: Blend Amarula liqueur and coffee liqueuer with milk (I use the Magic Bullet).
pour into a glass and top off with Coke Zero or the real thing if you prefer.

name: Swinging Safari
directions: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a tall glass.

name: Tequila Cocktail
directions: Fill four tall glasses with ice cubes.
Cut the lemon in half lengthwise, then cut the ends off of the lemon halves.  Cut the lemon halves crosswise into thin slices and divide the lemon slices among the glasses.
Pour 2 tablespoons/30 ml of each of the cassis, lemon juice and tequila into each glass. Pour 1/2 cup/120 ml of ginger ale into each glass and stir to blend!

name: Chocolaty-Coffee Milk
directions: Heat the milk in the microwave for 1 minute and 30 seconds.
Put the cocoa, coffee and sugar and stir well.
Drink up!

name: Vanilla Chai Coffee Cooler
directions: Place coffee, sweetener, vanilla, cinnamon and allspice in pitcher.
Add water; stir until coffee granules are completely dissolved.
Stir in milk and ice cubes; pour evenly into 4 tall glasses.
Serve immediately.

name: Coffee Slushie, Low Sugar  -  Fat Free
directions: Place all ingredients in blender container; cover.
Blend on high speed until ice is crushed.
Pour evenly into 2 glasses.

name: Dreamsicle
directions: Combine creme de noyaux, orange juice and half-and-half with ice in a cocktail shaker.
Shake and strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

name: Southern Comfort
directions: In Mixing Glass With Ice Add all ingredients and serve chilled.

name: Creme De Noyaux Shot
directions: Pour ingredients into a medium-sized cocktail glass, stir gently and serve.

name: Sunfire
directions: Combine Creme De Noyaux and Coconut Rum in a highball glass.
Fill with Pineapple Juice and
Enjoy.

name: Texas Cool Aid
directions: Combine all ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake, Strain and Serve in a glass.

name: Pure Comfort Hot Buttered Rum
directions: In a large bowl, beat butter and brown sugar until fluffy.
Beat in cream and icing sugar until smooth.
Stir in spices.
Chill for 30 minutes to firm up.  Scoop out 2 tablespoons worth and roll into balls.  Place in freezer to firm up before placing in a freezer container.
To serve:
Place rum, boiling water and a buttered rum ball in a mug.  Stir and enjoy!

similar.name: Dad's Hot Buttered Rum by the Mug

name: Best Beer Margarita
directions: Pour the limeade, tequila, Seven-Up, water and beer into a large glass pitcher; stir with a long-handled spoon until completely blended and the frozen limeade has completely melted.
Add in lots of ice.
Adjust with extra water if the mixture is too sweet.
Serve each glass with a lime wedge on the end.

name: Refreshing Sweet Iced Tea
directions: Heat a full cup of water in the microwave until boiling hot. I use a large measuring cup.
Submerge tea bags in water and let steep 3 minutes or until water gets dark.
Pour dark water into pitcher. Refill cup with hot water from the faucet and let steep for 2 minutes.
Add sugar to pitcher. Stir until dissolved.
Add hot water from cup and than fill the rest of the pitcher with hot water from the sink. Stir and Refrigirate.
Enjoy!
I refill my cup and let steep 4 times, but it depends on how dark you like your tea. If you are in a rush, 1 steep will do.

similar.name: Southern Sweet Iced Tea, Hotel Style

name: Razberi White Russian
directions: Pour the three ingredients over ice.
Garnish with raspberries.

similar.name: White Russian Drink - Very Low Fat

name: Instant Iced Cafe Mocha Latte
directions: Mix coffee granules and boiling water.
Add sweetened condensed milk and cold water until completely blended.
Mix in chocolate milk and add cold milk (add white milk in amount to desired flavor; I usually use more than 4 cups, especially if the chocolate milk being used is very dark).
Chill at least one hour and serve over ice.

name: Better Chai from a Chai Tea Bag
directions: Place water and tea bag in a small saucepan over high heat.
Bring to a boil, then lower heat and simmer for about ten minutes, until the water is reduced by half.  If less than 1/2 cup of water remains after ten minutes, just top up with more water.
Remove tea bag and stir in milk and honey or sugar.  Allow the chai to just return to a boil, then pour into a mug and serve.
Note that if you let chai sit for too long, it will form a "skin."  This is normal, but if you'd rather not have it, periodically stir your chai while you enjoy it.

name: Sparkling Paradise
directions: Into a cocktail glass,pour Paradise Mango Rum and soft drink, then stir.
Garnish and enjoy!

*Note - If you can't find Paradise Mango Rum liqueur, Cruzan will work great here and is inexpensive to boot.  To make it a bit more like the liqueur, you might want to add a splash of mango nectar!    Delicious either way!

name: Mango Black Tea
directions: Bring water to a boil, turn off heat add tea bags and steep until tea is dark, about 5 minutes. Remove bags, add mango nectar and add sugar, to taste. Stir until sugar is dissolved. Place in pitcher and add mint leaves.
Pour over ice and garnish with mango slices.

name: Raspberry Lemonade
directions: Make simple syrup by boiling 2 cups water with one cup sugar until sugar dissolves.
Cool completely.
Fill a crystal pitcher with crushed ice.
Stir the juice of 4 lemons into the simple syrup.
Pour this over the ice.
Stir well.
Add more water if needed to fill the pitcher.
Stir in the raspberries.
This is the point I added the sparklin lemonade.
Float thin rounds of lemon on top.

name: The Perfect Cup of Tea-British Style
directions: First, you have to boil the water - don't just heat it, boil it. Second, add the boiling water to the tea bag, not the other way round. - putting the water in the cup and adding the bag to it - is a recipe for disaster. Unless the water is at boiling point when it makes contact with the tea, the tea will never properly brew.
Make sure the cup or pot is nice and hot before you start. If necessary, rinse it out with near-boiling water. And keep it covered while the tea is brewing.

Leave the bag in the water for at least two minutes - longer if you like your tea strong. And for goodness sake, resist the temptation to dunk. Just leave the bag alone until the drink is ready!  Add milk and sugar to taste.

similar.name: The Perfect Pot and Cup of English Tea!
Making a Perfect Cup or Pot of Tea

name: Blue Light Special
directions: Pour all ingredients except pineapple juice into a cocktail shaker, and mix well.
Pour into a cocktail glass filled with ice and add pineapple juice to taste.
Mix well.

name: Adirondack Margaritas
directions: Mix all ingredients together in a 4-quart pitcher until thoroughly blended.
Chill until ready to serve.

name: Mocha
directions: Combine the dry milk powder, Splenda and Nestle's Quik in a large mug.
Add the hot coffee and mix well to combine.
Top with 1 tablespoon of Cool Whip Lite.

name: P.s. I Love You! (Cocktail Beverage)
directions: Pour all ingredients over ice into a 6 oz old-fashioned glass.
Stir w/a swizzle stick & dust w/a light sprinkle of ground nutmeg.

name: Cadillac Margarita
directions: Shake tequila, triple sec, sweet and sour mix, and lime juice with ice.
Pour over ice in salt-rimmed margarita glass.
Float Grand Marnier on top. Garnish with slice of lime if desired.

name: Amarula Blush
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled cocktail glass or over ice in a rocks glass.
Garnish with a fresh raspberry.

name: The Recipe (From the Baldwin Sisters on Walton's Mountain)
directions: Serve over ice on a VERY HOT day.

name: Sugar Free Iced Rocky Road Mocha
directions: Combine all ingredients In a tall (16 oz) glass or 2 8oz glasses .
stir and serve.

similar.name: Ice Cream Parlor Coffee Mocha Sodas

name: Liquid Flavored Coffee Creamer
directions: Combine all ing. Stir until creamer and sugar are disolved. Store in fridg.

similar.name: Low-Cal Iced Coffee With Milk (Cafe Au Lait)

name: Simple Iced Latte
directions: Mix together all ingredients and refrigerate until ready to serve.  Serve over ice.
If desired add sweetener or flavoring of your choice, but I encourage you to try it like this before you add anything.

name: Low-Cal Iced Coffee With Milk (Cafe Au Lait)
directions: Add the coffee to the cold water and let it sit for a while, around 5 minutes (because theres no heat to transfer the flavour to the water, it needs time to mix).
Add the milk, sweetener, cinnamon, and vanilla extract to the coffee and stir.
Add ice cubes before serving. Pour into a tall glass. Enjoy.

name: Morning Iced Coffee
directions: Fill a tall glass 2/3 full of ice.
Add cream and Splenda.
Dust ice with cinnamon or cocoa powder.
Fill with coffee and stir well.

name: After-Dinner Mocha
directions: For every 8 oz of water, brew 2 Tbsp of coffee.
In a mug, add the cocoa (Swiss Miss will work), Cognac, Kahlua and Vanilla.  Add coffee, and top with the Half-n-Half.  If you like, garnish with whipped cream.  Serve HOT and enjoy!

name: Orange Iced Mocha
ingredients: Copycat French Vanilla Liquid Coffee Creamer
directions: In a 20 oz glass or bottle, mix coffee and water until coffee is dissolved.
Add creamer, chocolate milk, milk and extract.
Stir.
Add just enough ice cubes to leave enough room at top for whipped cream.
Top with whipped cream.

name: Hot Cocoa Mix in Bulk
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Store in an air-tight container.
Use about 1/3 cup mix to 1 cup of hot water.

similar.name: Hot Cocoa Mix in a Mug

name: Iced Caramel Coffee
directions: While the coffee is still hot, pour it into your measuring cup and add the caramel sauce (Hint, you needn’t actually measure the sauce in a separate cup if you’re using a 2-cup measure for the coffee. Just pour in the sauce until the coffee rises to the 1 3/4 cup mark0.

Add the sugar, too, then stir until both the sugar and caramel sauce have dissolved. Transfer to the refrigerator and chill until cold (You can hasten the process by using the freezer, but don’t let it freeze.).
When you’re ready to serve, divide the coffee between 2 tall chilled glasses filled with coffee ice cubes.
Add milk or half-and-half to each glass, to taste.
Top with whipped cream, if desired, then garnish with cinnamon if you’re using it. Finally, drizzle a little additional caramel sauce over the top as well.
Serve.

name: Creole Bloody Mary
directions: Shake all ingredients with ice in a shaker.  just until chilled.
Strain over fresh ice in 2 12 oz. glasses.  Sprinkle lemon pepper lightly over both drinks. Add celery stick if desired.

name: Cinnamon Coffee
directions: Add coffee grounds and water to coffee maker as you normally do.
Sprinkle some ground cinnamon on the coffee grounds, and brew as usual.

name: Simple Chocolate Iced Coffee
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice.
Pour milk and chocolate syrup over the ice.
Add cold coffee and stir well until chocolate syrup is dissolved.
Can be fancied up with a dollop of whipped cream, a shot of Kahlua, and a few curls of shaved chocolate if you like.
Diabetics and dieters can substitute sugar-free chocolate syrup.

name: Green Tea & Lime Slushy
directions: Combine all ingredients in a blender until nice and slushy.

similar.name: Southern Sweet Iced Tea, Hotel Style

name: Sake Bloody Mary
directions: Pour all ingredients into a tall glass.
Add ice.
Stir with the stalk of celery.

name: Ww Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix all ingredients. Cornstarch may sound odd, but it makes it nice and thick.  Without it it tastes to "diet-y" and has no body.  If you don't mind watery hot coco and want to be lower in calories, feel free to do without.
Blend 1/4 cup of dry mixture to 1 cup of hot water.

similar.name: Crock-Pot Hot Cocoa for a Group
Candy Cane Hot Cocoa Mix - Gift

name: Michelada Authentic
directions: In huge glass or pitcher toss a few cubes of ice.  Add all the ingredients.  Fill a pint glass, get comfortable, and have a refreshing sip!

name: Liquid Sunset
directions: Shake the ingredients with ice and strain into a chilled glass.
Garnish with a grapefruit wedge.

name: Caravella & Cream
directions: Combine in a shaker.
Shake well and pour into a rocks glass filled with ice.
Garnish with a lemon strip.
Enjoy!  :).

name: Old Capri Long Drink
directions: Pour into a long drink glass filled with ice.
Fill with Spinelli Asti Spumante.
Decorate with a slice of lemon and twig of fresh mint.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Napoli
directions: Pour into a tall glass over ice.
Fill with cola,garnish with lemon slice and enjoy! ;).

name: Cranberry Milano
directions: Add to shaker of ice.
Pour into martini glass.
Enjoy!;).

name: Orange Milano
directions: Add to shaker of ice.
Pour into martini glass.
Enjoy!;).

name: Caravella Caribbean
directions: Pour into a tall glass over ice;
fill with tropical fruit punch.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Caravella Bellini
directions: Pour into a champagne flute.
Enjoy! ;).

name: Iced Mocha
directions: Brew an extra-strong 1/4 pot of the Starbucks columbia coffee. BUNN is the best coffee maker for this drink, other coffee makers may make a weaker, less flavorful brew.
In the bottom of a 16oz cup add the NesQuik chocolate syrup.  Add about 1.5oz of the concentrated coffee (treat it like espresso.)
Begin to stir while adding 4oz of half-n-half cream.  Fill the cup with milk to 3/4 full.  Then top the drink off with ice cubes.  Enjoy!

name: Orange Pearls
directions: Shake with ice.
Serve up with orange slice.

name: Desert Orange
directions: Shake with ice.
Serve up with maraschino cherry.

name: Gingered Pear
directions: Shake with ice, strain.
Serve up with slice of fresh pear and fresh ginger curl.

name: Lemon Diamond
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve up with lemon slice.

name: Cosmo Pearl
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve up with lime wheel.

name: Purple Wind
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Maraschino cherry garnish.

name: Maiden's Milk
directions: Serve on the rocks.
Garnish with maraschino cherry.

name: Asian Melon
directions: Shake with ice and strain.
Serve in a martini glass and enjoy!

name: Banzai Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients.
Serve on the rocks or shaken and strained.

name: Saké Margarita
directions: Blend  all ingredients with crushed ice, and pour into margarita glass.
Garnish rim with salt.

name: Lychee Lovedrop
directions: Mix equal parts of lychee drink & Momokawa Diamond.
Squeeze juice of fresh Myer lemon.
Shake with ice and serve straight up or over ice.
Garnish with lemon slice.

name: Lychee Margarita
directions: Equal parts of lychee drink and margarita mix with two parts Momokawa Diamond.
Shake with ice and serve over crushed ice in a salt-rimmed margarita glass or on the rocks.
Garnish with lime wedge.

name: Orange Creamsicle
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with orange slice.

name: Pineapple Pearl
directions: Shake with ice and strain into a martini glass.
Garnish with pineapple slice.

name: Samurai Mojito
directions: Muddle saké and mojito mix with mint leaves, and then add club soda .
Serve in a 16-oz. glass garnished with a mint sprig or lime wheel.

name: Rum and Coke
directions: Mix ingredients in a highball glass two-thirds full of ice.
Stir briskly and serve.

name: Cobalt Sea
directions: Mix all ingredients in a glass and add ice.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Lavender Margarita
directions: In a shaker, combine 2 oz. silver tequila, 1/2 oz. Cointreau, 1 oz. simple syrup and the juice of half a lime and let sit.
On a plate, mix the sugar and dried lavender and use it to rim the outside of a rocks glass.
Fill the glass with ice.
Shake and strain the contents of the strainer into the glass.
Enjoy! ;).

name: Bailey's Irish Cream Recipe Copy
directions: If you don't have any whipping cream, that's okay!  It's great without it too.

Put the whipping cream in the blender and whip up until thick then throw all the rest of the ingredients in the blender and blend.  If you don't have an espresso maker you can use 1 Tbsp Instant coffee but it tastes so much better with espresso or even really strong coffee (about 4 ounces)  If you want to beef up the alcohol content, use 100 proof vodka.  This recipe has a million calories and even more fat but who cares!

similar.name: Bailey's Irish Cream Liqueur (Gift-Giving or for Yourself!)

name: Simple Honey Hot Chocolate
directions: Mix the first 3 ingredients and 1 tablspoon of the milk together in a mug until smooth.
Heat the remaining milk in a small saucepan over medium heat just until you start to see small bubbles around the edges - do not boil.
Add heated milk to mug and top with a sprinkling of cinnamon over the top!

similar.name: Crock-Pot Hot Cocoa for a Group

name: Cranberry Ginger "cider"
directions: Put ginger in a pot with the water and bring to a boil.  Lower heat and simmer 20 minutes.  Add cranberry juice and heat just to a boil.
Pour through a fine sieve into a heat-proof pitcher.  Discard ginger.
Serve steaming hot in mugs.

name: Best Ever Hot Cocoa Mix
directions: Combine ingredients in large bowl.
Working in two batches, pulse ingredients in food processor until chocolate is finely ground.
Store in airtight container for up to 3 months.
Too make hot cocoa, stir 1/3 cup of the mix into 1 cup of hot (not boiling) milk.
Top with whipped cream or mini marshmallows and a little chocolate powder. I sometimes use cinnamon or nutmeg powder, instead. A little brandy and a crackling fire make for a real treat!

name: Baby Woo Woo
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.
Strain into a shot glass.

name: Irish Cream Recipe (Taste Matched to Baileys)
directions: The night before, boil the cans of condensed milk (dont open them) in plenty of water for 3 hours. Make sure when boiling that they are constantly covered with water, if not they may explode! Leave overnight to cool.
In a large bowl put the cooled condensed milk (should be thick and caramelised) and 300ml whiskey.
Get your whisk and start whisking till as many of the lumps as possible are gone.
Add cream, the tiniest pinch of salt and whisk.
Add a little hot water and whisk, you will see that the lumps will be disolved.
Add more hot water till your desired consistancy is reached- whisk.
Serve Chilled.

name: Frappuccino, the Way I Do It (Starbucks Copycat!)
directions: combine the coffee granules and hot cocoa mix in a mug.
Add the hot water and stir to dissolve.
Stir in the Dulce De Leche or Caramel Sauce. Make sure it fully dissolves into the coffee!
Top with skim milk, stir once again, and drink.
You can chill it I guess, but I never do, it just goes straight down.
For aesthetics sake I guess you can strain out any undissolved bits, but I'm way too lazy :P.

name: Kahlua Coffee Liqueur
directions: Combine sugar, coffee, vanilla, and water. Stir until sugar is dissolved completely. Set aside to cool. Allow this to cool, otherwise you will evaporate the alcohol.
Add vodka, stir until well mixed. Pour over ice,
Add your favorite ingredients, sit back, relax, and enjoy.
Life is good and so is this Kahlua. This keeps well, and gets better with age.

name: Sparkling Sakepom
directions: Rim a 10 oz., chilled martini glass with the sugar cayenne mixture.
Chill Pama Pomegranate Liqueur, Momokawa Diamond Sakè, and Stirrings grenadine in a shaker and strain in martini glass. Top with Moët & Chandon White Star and serve.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Fast Easy Horchata
directions: Fill a measured pitcher with 3 cups of water. Add rice flour, vanilla, cinnamon and mix well.
This will ensure there aren't any clumps.
Add the rest of the water to the 1 gallon measure line, condensed milk and sugar (to taste) Stir and mix well. Enjoy!

name: Brandy Coffee
directions: In a cocktail shaker place the creme de cacao, brandy, espresso, and whipping cream.
Add crushed ice, shake well, and strain into a cocktail glass. Sprinkle grated nutmeg on top and serve.

similar.name: Hot Buttered Rum Coffee - Non Alcoholic

name: Bejito
directions: Shake all ingredients together and pour into a tall glass of ice.
Garnish with limes and mint.

name: Obici Martini
directions: Stir all ingredients in a shaker or tumbler and pour into a martini glass.
Garnish with a twist of lime.
Enjoy!  :).

name: A Different Espresso Martini
directions: Shake all ingredients in a shaker of ice.
Pour into a chilled martini glass.
Garnish with three floating espresso beans.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: B-Ocean
directions: Add all ingredients to a tall glass of ice and garnish with a slice of orange and mint.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Fresh Smashin'
directions: Add all ingredients to a tall glass of ice.
Stir gently and garnish with a slice of grapefruit.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Disaronno Cosmo
directions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker of cracked ice.
Strain into a martini glass and garnish with a cherry or lemon slice.
Enjoy! ;).

name: Coffee Calypso
directions: Into a mug pour creme de cacao then add sugar and coffee. Stir well.
Pouring the whipping cream slowly over the back of a teaspoon, float the cream on top of the coffee.
Sprinkle the coffee granules on top and serve immediately.

name: Aztec Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Put all of the mix ingredients into a blender and blend until smooth.
To make the hot chocolate, put 1/4 cup of the mix into a mug and add 3/4 cup boiling hot water or coffee, stir in a couple of drops of vanilla extract; stir until well mixed.  Enjoy.

name: Mocha Drink Mix
directions: Put all ingredients in a blender and whirl away!
For the drink, add 2 heaping tbsp to a mug of hot milk, stir and enjoy!

name: Garden Mint Tea
directions: Tear off a handful of tea leaves.
Bring water to a boil and pour over the leaves.
Allow to steep for 5 to 7 minutes.
Remove leaves and add honey to taste.
Place ice cubes in glasses and pour hot tea over them.

The tea can also be made by the pitcher by using one quart of water and a 1/2 cup of tea leaves.  Place a quart of ice cubes in a pitcher and pour hot tea over them after the leaves have been removed and honey added.

name: Lovely
directions: Add both the vodka and the Intrigue liqueur to a glass of ice.
Garnish or not (including topping off with soda if you choose to), but do enjoy! ;).

name: Chocolate Kiev
directions: Combine in a mug, stir well.
Mellow out.

name: Double Chocolate Cocoa Mix in a Quart Jar
directions: FOR THE JAR:
Place the ingredients in the jar in this order:
Coffee creamer on bottom.
Powdered sugar.
Flavored drink mix.
Dry milk.
Chocolate chips go on top of milk.
Place ziploc of marshmallows on top.
Directions for Cocoa Mix.
**Double Chocolate Cocoa**.
Set marshmallows aside.
Empty mix into a large mixing bowl.
Blend mix very well with a whisk.
Place mix back into jar.
Place 1 1/2- 2TB of mix into a cup.  Add 1 cup of boiling water.  Stir until mixture is completely dissolved.
Top with marshmallows.

similar.name: Candy Cane Hot Cocoa Mix - Gift

name: Lazy, Low Calorie Minted Mocha
directions: Ensure the water is boiling.
Mix all the ingredients together.

name: Peppermint Coffee Cream
directions: Warm a brandy glass.
Add the creme de menthe and the sugar.
Add the hot coffee, stir well.
Pour the whipped cream over a spoon onto the top of the coffee.
Decorate with the slivers of mint chocolate. Drink through the cream without mixing.

name: Cocoa Coffee
directions: Put hot chocolate mix and Equal in the bottom of the cup.
Add coffee.
Stir and enjoy!

name: The Perfect Pot and Cup of English Tea!
directions: Only use freshly drawn cold water, ensure that kettles or water boilers are de-scaled regularly and that teapots are spotlessly clean.
Teapots should be warmed with hot water, which is then poured away.
Use the recommended number of tea bags or one teaspoon of loose tea per cup, AND one teaspoon for the pot. (For one person use a 10oz tea pot, for two persons a 20oz tea pot is recommended.).
Water should always be freshly boiled and boiling when added to tea.
Leave to brew for 3-5 minutes before serving. Stir before serving.
Pour a little milk into each cup before pouring the tea through a strainer if necessary, and sweeten with sugar as required.
You can omit the milk and serve the tea with lemon slices if you wish.

similar.name: Making a Perfect Cup or Pot of Tea
The Perfect Cup of Tea-British Style

name: Snow Cocoa
directions: Combine all ingredients in a crock pot.
Cover and cook on low for 2-2 1/2 hours or until chocolate is melted and mixture is hot.
Stir well to combine before serving.

name: Diabetic Chai Tea
directions: Heat water to boiling. Add tea bags; reduce heat and simmer for 2 to 4 minutes, depending on how strong you like your tea.
Remove tea bags and add spices. Simmer for additional 2 minutes.
Add milk and Splenda, heat to a near boil stirring constantly.
Serve and enjoy.

name: Cinnamon Coffee -- Without the Mess
directions: Measure your usual quantity of coffee into the filter of your 10-12 cup drip pot.
Hit the half cinnamon stick with a hammer or meat mallet to break it into splintery pieces -- not too huge, not too fine. Put the cinnamon splinters into the filter with the coffee.
Pour the vanilla over the coffee and cinnamon in the filter.
Fill your drip machine with water in your usual way. Run it to make the coffee, using the "strong" selection on the slide if there is one.
Good hot or iced with sweetener and whitener of your choice.
Note -- A dollop of whipped cream and a dusting of ground cinnamon makes an elegant presentation for a special occasion.
Note -- Works just fine on decaf too.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee Something - GOOD GOOD YUM YUM

name: White Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small sauce pan combine 1/4 cup milk and chips.
Heat over medium heat, whisking until chocolate melts.
Stir in remaining milk and heat to warm.
Pour into 2 or 3 glasses.
Garnish with whipped topping and blue sugar crystals and sprinkles.

name: Raspberry Eggnog
directions: Mix Chambord and Eggnog in an on-the-rocks glass.
If the mood hits you, top with chocolate shavings, nutmeg, or even a fresh raspberry if your eggnog is thick enough.

name: Dad's Hot Buttered Rum by the Mug
directions: Place ingredients in a mug and fill with boiling water.
Allow to sit a few minutes for the spices to steep.
Enjoy responsibly!

name: Ww 0 Pt.  Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix the three dry ingredients together in a ziploc bag.
Add 2-3 tbsp of the dry mix to a cup of water.
Microwave on high for 90 seconds.
Add sweet n low to taste.
Enjoy and don't feel guilty!

name: Sugar-Free/Fat-Free Holiday Eggnog
directions: In a bowl combine the pudding mix with 2 cups fat-free milk, tiny pinch nutmeg (if using) vanilla or rum extract and sugar substitute (to taste) mix on low speed using an electric mixture until thickened (adjust the sugar substitute to taste if needed).
Pour into a large container with a tight-fitting lid; add in 3 cups milk, cover with lid and shake vigorously.
Add in evaporated milk with remaining 2 cups milk and shake well again.
Chill and shake again before using.
Delicious!

similar.name: Light and Creamy Low Fat and Sugar Free Eggnog

name: Eggnog
directions: In a VERY large bowl, with an electric mixer, beat the sugar and egg yolks until light colored and dull.  Slowly add the bourbon and rum.  Stir in the milk and cream and then the brandy.  Beat the egg white with 1/3 cup sugar till stiff peaks form.  Stir in the whites (I use a wisk).

Note:  If you are going to bottle the eggnog you need to store in a large container and whisk it evereyday until all the egg whites are incorporated, this can take 4-5 days, and a real good excuse to sample some everyday.  The egg whites keep rising to the top and makes bottling hard.
If you are making for a party make the day before and give it a good stir before pouring in the punch bowl, top with more nutmeg if desired.

name: Christmas Cranberry
directions: Combine in a cocktail shaker over ice.  Strain into glasses filled with crushed ice and garnish with frozen cranberries.
To make a pitcher, just multiply the amounts of each by the amount of servings you are making.  Pour into pitcher with cranberries and pour over ice.

name: Easy Non-Dairy Hot Chocolate Mix
directions: Mix dry ingredients.
Store for later use or add 8 cups of boiling water.
Serve with marshmallows, cool whip, a candy cane, caramel flavoring, mint extract --  or for the grown-ups, peppermint schnapps.

name: Hot Cocoa Mix in a Mug
directions: Combine dry milk, sugar and 1/4 cup + 2 T. cocoa in a large bowl with lid.  Cover and Shake.
Spoon into decorated holiday baggies. Toss mini marshmallows on top. Place baggie into large holiday coffee mug. Decorate as desired.
Attach following recipe:.
Measure 1/2 cup cocoa mix into mug.  Stir in 1 cup hot water or milk.

name: Gold Tea (Alcoholic Drink)
directions: Pour brewed tea into a  tall glass filled with ice or in a small saucepan.
Add the Goldschlager and stir well.
If drinking as a hot drink, heat until desired temperature.
Sit back and relax.

name: Apple-Cranberry Cider
directions: Stir ingredients together and bring to a boil in a saucepan.
Lower heat and simmer for ten minutes.
Serve hot.

name: White Russian Drink
directions: Pour Kahlua and vodka into glass.
Add half-and-half and Coke.
Stir gently.
Add ice if desired.

similar.name: White Russian Drink - Very Low Fat

name: Holiday Coffee
directions: Prepare coffee according to manufacturer's directions.
Stir sweetened condensed milk into coffee, and serve immediately with a dollop of whipped cream, a stick of cinnamon and a maraschino cherry.

name: Caramel Apple Tea
directions: Steep teabag in water 3-5 minutes, depending on desired strength.
Add caramel syrup.
Garnish with cinnamon, diced apple, and/or whipped cream if desired.  Enjoy!

name: Santa Claus Milk
directions: Combine 4 cups milk with cinnamon stick and cloves in a saucepan; cook over medium heat 15 minutes, stirring occasionally. (Heat thoroughly, but do not boil.)  Remove and discard cinnamon and cloves.

Combine sugar and cornstarch; add 2 tablespoons cold milk, stirring until smooth.  Add to hot milk mixture, stirring constantly; cook 2 minutes, stirring constantly.  Ladle into mugs, and sprinkle with nutmeg.  Serve immediately.

similar.name: Creamy Hot Chocolate Mix in a Jar (For Gift-Giving)

name: Eggnog -- South Beach Diet
directions: Pour 1 1/2 cups egg substitute into a bowl.
Add artificial sweetener, and mix on medium speed until light and fluffy.
Gradually blend in vanilla, evaporated skim milk, fat-free half and half, and Brandy extract.
Chill for 24 hours to allow flavors to blend. To serve, stir well and sprinkle with nutmeg.

name: Ginger Chai
directions: Peel the ginger, and cut the cube into 2 pieces.
Place the ginger, cinnamon, anise, orange zest, cardamom in a piece of cheesecloth.
Fill the cup(s) you will be using with water twice and add to the pot.
Add the honey and the bag of spices to the pot.
Bring to a boil, stirring.
Then, reduce heat to low, cover and simmer for 10 to 15 minutes.
Remove the lid, and add the loose tea.
Stir while increasing the heat to bring the mixture back to a boil.
Boil for 1 minute.
Remove from heat and add enough milk, a little at a time, to achieve the desired caramel color.
Remove the cheesecloth sack and serve hot.

similar.name: Better Chai from a Chai Tea Bag

name: Aunt Helen's Eggnog
directions: Beat together eggs, condensed milk and vanilla.
Slowly beat in milk.
Gently fold in whipped cream.
If you are adding alcohol, rum, brandy or bourbon are the traditional choices.
Sprinkle nutmeg on top to taste.

name: French Toddy (For Kate and French Tart)
directions: Gently warm the Calvados + brandy together over a low heat & transfer to 2 lrg glasses (A balloon-shaped or squaty glass works best).
Dissolve sugar in hot coffee, add to liqueurs & stir.
While the contents are still rotating from the stirring, gently pour 1 tbsp of the cream over the surface in a circular motion. DO NOT STIR ~ just sip & savour.

name: Southern Sweet Tea
directions: Heat 1 quart of water and 5 tea bags in microwave for 6 minutes.  Remove from microwave and allow to steep for 5-10 minutes.
Remove teabags and pour into gallon pitcher.  Add remaining 3 quarts of water and 3/4 cup sugar.  Stir and chill in refrigerator.

name: Spiced Winter Tea Mix
directions: Combine all ingredients in bowl until well combined.
Store in airtight container in cabinet.
Or, add 1 cup or so each to some zipper bags, place each in new mugs, wrap with cellophane and ribbon and label or tag with the following:
Spiced Winter Tea:
Place 2 teaspoons of mix into mug.
Fill with boiling water and stir for a delicious and warm Winter treat.

similar.name: Hot Spiced Tea (Tang-Based, Aka Russian Tea)

name: Christmas Cream Liqueur
directions: Dissolve the coffee in 1 tablespoon of boiling water. Put the dulce de leche into a large bowl and beat in the coffee, vanilla extract and brandy. The mixture should be smooth. Stir in the single cream until it's all well mixed.
Pour into 1 large or several smaller sterilised bottles. The drink will keep in the fridge for 2 weeks.

name: Hot Cocoa for Two
directions: mix ingredients in a small bowl.
divide in two mugs.
warm up 2 1/2 c water.
pour 1 1/4 c water in each mug and stir.
ENJOY!

similar.name: Double Chocolate Cocoa Mix in a Quart Jar
Heaven in a Cup Hot Chocolate

name: Dusk Til Dawn
directions: Combine Vodka, Chambord Liqueur  and lemon juice into a champagne flute.
Slowly add Yellow to create the desired layering effect and avoid excess froth.

name: Barely Blush
directions: Add to a champagne flute Vodka, strawberry liqueur and cranberry juice.
Slowly add Yellow to avoid excessive froth. Garnish with pomegranate seeds.

name: Hot Eggnog
directions: Combine evaporated milk, egg substitute, and sugar, stir constantly over low head in a nonstick saucepan, until bubbles begin to form around the edges and the mixture thickens. Should be 12-15 minutes.

Add skim milk, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg. Kick up the heat to medium, whisk constantly until just heated through, should be about 5 minutes. Serve at once and sprinkle with the fresh grated nutmeg if you wish.

name: Minted Hot Cocoa
directions: In a large mug (20 oz) or microwavable container, mix the cocoa, peppermint and hot water together and stir well.
Microwave for 1 minute on High and stir.
Add the milk and vanilla.
Microwave for another 1 1/2 to 2 minutes until hot.
Add the sugar substitute and stir.
Top with the whipped cream if using.
Enjoy.

name: Delicious Sweet Tea
directions: Bring four cups of water to a mild-moderate boil.  Remove heat as soon as bubbles approach the surface of the water.
Pour (splash) boiling water over tea bags in a glass pitcher.
Let steep 1 hour.
Remove bags and squeeze them on their way out; be careful not to tear them.
Add sugar to taste (2/3 cup works well for me).  Stir until dissolved.
Add two cups of cold water.  Stir well.
Chill & Serve!

name: Rainy Day Mocha Malt (Hot Drink)
directions: Place instant breakfast mix and instant coffee in mug.
Add hot milk and stir until mix is dissolved.

name: Alcoholic Shirley Temple
directions: mix and enjoy!

name: Crantinis
directions: Fill martini shaker or 3-cup covered container half full with ice. Add all ingredients except cranberries and lime slices; cover and shake.
Pour into martini or tall stemmed glasses, straining the ice. Garnish glasses with fresh cranberries and lime slices on picks.

name: Buttered Rum Coffee Mix
directions: Place coffee and nutmeg in a blender or food processor fitted with a steel blade.
With processor running, add flavorings.
Stop processor and scrape sides of container with a spatula.
Process 10 seconds longer.
Store in refrigerator.
Yields: Mix for eight 6-ounce servings.
To Use:
Place minimum of 1 tsp in a 1 cup measuring cup and add boiling water. Stir and strain into a 6 oz cup.

similar.name: Hot Buttered Rum Coffee - Non Alcoholic

name: Arabian Coffee
directions: Mix all ingredients in a saucepan and heat until foam gathers on top.
Do not pass through a filter.
Stir it up before you serve it.

similar.name: Moroccan Coffee With Six Fragrant Spices

name: Hot Baja Coffee
directions: In slow-cooker, combine hot water, coffee, and liqueurs.
Cover and heat on LOW 2-4 hours.
Ladle into mugs or heat-proof glasses.
Top with whipped cream and.
grated chocolate.

name: White Russian Drink - Very Low Fat
directions: Pour Kahlua and vodka into glass.
Add half-and-half and Coke.
Stir gently.
Add ice if desired.

name: Cuervo Daisy
directions: Shake all ingredients well with cracked ice.  Strain and pour into two chilled martini glasses.

name: Matt's "six-Demon Bag" Bloody Mary
directions: Chill high-ball glasses in a freezer beforehand.
Fill high-ball glass with ice cubes.
Combine all ingredients in the martini shaker.
Shake ingredients well. I mean, WELL.
Strain the drink into the glass over ice.
Garnish the edge with a slice of lemon.
Enjoy!

name: Orange Spice Tea
directions: Mix all ingredients together and store in an air tight container.
Stir approx 1-2 tablespoons of mixture (to your taste) into a coffee cup size of hot water.

name: Champagne Antoine
directions: Shake the gin, vermouth, and Pernod with ice.
Strain into a champagne flute.
Top with champagne.
Garnish with a lemon twist.
Enjoy!  ;).

name: Simple Chocolate Chai Tea
directions: Boil water.
Pour 6 oz. water into mug along with 1 packet chai tea.
Let steep for a few minutes.
As much as possible, remove and squeeze out tea packet to get all the goodness.
Add chocolate mix packet.
Stir well and enjoy.

similar.name: Chai Tea the Simple, Quick, and Delicious Way!

name: Coffee Flavored Kisses Drink
directions: Brew the coffee.
Mix the Chambord raspberry liqueur and Bailey's irish cream into the coffee. Sweeten with sugar to taste, and top with whipped cream.

similar.name: Spiced Cream Coffee or Spiced Cream Irish Coffee

name: Cinnamon Mocha Coffee from Taste of Home
directions: In a coffeemaker basket - using a filter - combine the coffee grounds and ground cinnamon.  Prepare 4 cups of coffee as directed on your coffee maker directions.

As coffee is brewing, in a medium saucepan, combine the milk, sugar, cocoa and vanilla and cook over medium-low heat, stirring occasionally, for 5-7 minutes (till small bubbles appear on the sides of the pan) - DO NOT BOIL.
Pour the hot milk mixture into four coffee cups/mugs, then add the cinnamon brewed coffee.
Optional, garnish with cinnamon sticks and a dollop of whipped cream.

similar.name: Spiced Coffee Something - GOOD GOOD YUM YUM

name: Steamed Caramel Milk or Caramel Latte
directions: Warm 8 oz. of skim milk in coffee mug in microwave for 1:30-2 minutes.
Stir in 2 teaspoons of caramel coffee syrup.
Relax & enjoy!

name: Peppermint Mocha Liquid Coffee Creamer
directions: pour the half and half into a medium saucepan.
stir chocolate chips into the pan.
turn the heat onto medium-low and melt the chocolate into the half and half.
DO NOT LET THIS BOIL.
Once the chocolate is melted turn the heat off.
give it a good stir and mix in the peppermint syrup.
Store in a container in the fridge for up to 2 weeks :) (but it never lasts that long, lol).

name: Pineapple Southern Comfort Yummy Martini
directions: Place ice in large size/deep martini glass to chill and set aside.
In your favorite shaker pour southern comfort then pineapple juice over ice.
Shake Shake Shake!
Empty ice from martini glass and pour drink ( strained ) into the chilled glass.
Garnish with lime slice.

name: Emeril's Bloody Mary Mix
directions: In a blender combine the tomato juice, lemon juice, lime juice, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, garlic, and hot sauce and process until smooth. Transfer to a nonreactive container and add salt and black pepper, to taste. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled, at least 2 hours and up to overnight.
When ready to serve, fill each glass with ice.
Add 1 ounce of vodka to each glass, then fill the glass with the bloody mary mix. Stir well, and garnish each glass with a pickled green bean and a pickled okra.

name: Easy Ice Tea (Clone/Copycat of Lipton Ice Tea)
directions: Boil water in a pot and add tea bags and allow to steep for one hour.
Pour into pitcher when cool and add sugar.
Mix well until dissolved and then add lemon juice.
Chill and serve.

similar.name: Southern Sweet Iced Tea, Hotel Style

name: Loco Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix milk, instant coffee and chocolate syrup together in a mug.
Place into microwave for 1 - 1 1/2 minutes.
Top with lots of whipped cream and cinnamon sugar.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Instant Hot Cocoa With a Kick!

name: Starburst Shooter
directions: Put ice in shaker. Add all ingredients and shake.
Strain into tall shot glass.
SHOOT! yummmmmy! :D.

name: Cafe Mocha Latte
directions: Combine all ingredients into a sauce pan; heat over medium-low heat
Serve warm over ice.
ENJOY.

name: Bailey's Irish After 8 Shooter
directions: Shake all ingredients with  ice and strain into a glass.

name: Gaelic Iced Coffee
directions: In a shaker, combine liqueurs and the instant coffee.  Shake like mad to dissolve the coffe crystals.
Pour over ice in a tall glass.
Top with whipped cream and drizzle creme de menthe on top of the whipped cream.
Sip and enjoy!

name: .....rosie
directions: Shake in ice.
Serve in cocktail glasses.
Can garnish with orange or lemon curl.

similar.name: The Recipe (From the Baldwin Sisters on Walton's Mountain)

name: Applebee's Authentic Pomegranate Margarita
directions: Mix all ingredients in a shaker with ice.
Strain into a martini glass and garnish with a skewered marachino cherry and lime wedge.
Delish!

name: Bloody Bull
directions: In a large pitcher combine well all the ingredients. Refrigerate for 30 minutes or until chilled and serve in glasses filled with ice.

name: Spiked Beer
directions: In a tall glass, salt rim if desired,  pour beer, add chilled Bloody mary mix and vodka.
Garnish with Celery Stick.

name: Sommer's Cinnamon Mocha
directions: Dissolve one heaping teaspoon of Pero Extra Dark Roast into the hot water.
Stir in sugar, cocoa powder, and cinnamon.  Taste and adjust amounts if necessary.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Cinnamon Mocha Coffee from Taste of Home

name: Instant Hot Cocoa
directions: Mix dry ingredients in the bottom of a mug.
Add hot water.
Enjoy!

similar.name: Low Carb, Low Sugar Hot Cocoa

name: Jarrett's Margaritas
directions: Combine all ingredients in blender. Mix until a slushy consistency and pour into salted glasses. Enjoy!

name: Vanilla's in the Mist
directions: Fill high ball glass halfway with ice.
Pour in vanilla vodka.
Top off with Sierra Mist or Sierra Mist Free.
Note: For a none alcoholic version, use 1 tsp vanilla extract instead of the vodka; it's just as good! I also intend to try this by rimming the glass with vanilla sugar. Yum!

name: Mango Margarita
directions: To make Simple Syrup:  Combine 1 cup of sugar and 1 cup of water in a small saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves. Bring to a boil; boil 15 minutes or until syrup is reduced to 3/4 cup.
Combine first 6 ingredients in a blender, cover with lid, and process until smooth.
Add ice to make 4 cups; process until smooth.

name: Cold Ice Coffee
directions: Brew the coffee
Add the instant espresso crystals until desolve.
Add the hazelnut syrup and coffee creamer.
Add ice and enjoy!

name: Lite Hot Chocolate
directions: Mix together splenda, cocoa, salt, and hot water in a small saucepan until smooth.
Bring to a boil.
Lower heat, and stir in dairy beverage until blended.
Heat mixture until hot, but do not boil.

name: Amarula-Rula
directions: Mix all ingredients over ice.
Cheers!

name: Chai Tea Latte
directions: Mix all dry ingredients together.
Add dry ingredients to 1-1/2 cups milk and vanilla in microwave proof bowl or saucepan
In microwave or on stovetop: Heat until the temperature you like your latte (do not boil).
Froth with portable electric wisk / frother --- or by hand and pour into mug (I make mine every morning to drink in a travel mug on the way to work).

similar.name: Better Chai from a Chai Tea Bag

name: Cajun Bloody Mary
directions: In a cocktail shaker,combine the first 5 ingredients and shake briefly.
Pour over ice into double old fashioned glass and season to taste with salt and fresh ground black pepper.
Cut a slit into jalapeno and slip it onto the rim of the glass for garnish.

name: California Iced Coffee
directions: For each serving, pour 2 tablespoons brandy into an Irish Coffee mug or heat safe glass.
Fill 2/3 full with hot strong coffee (see note below).
Top with 1 scoop chocolate, coffee or vanilla flavor ice cream.
Finish with a generous dollop of whipped cream and a maraschino cherry on top. A dusting of cocoa powder and a wafer cookie on the side is nice, too.
Offer sugar, to individual taste.
Note: Pour coffee over ice, if desired.

name: Best Margarita Ever!!!
directions: Blend all ingredients and serve on the rocks with salt, straight up, or frozen if you chose to add all ice and no water.

name: Homemade Kahlua
directions: Mix sugar, water and coffee together and bring to a slow boil.  (Be sure to watch this as it may boil over).
Turn heat down and simmer 1 hour.
Remove from heat and let cool.  Cover with plastic wrap.
Let sit for 12 hours then remove wrap. (It will pick up film from the top).
Add vodka and vanilla, stir well.
Bottle it or add it to your favorite drink!

name: Creamy Iced Coffee
directions: In a medium bowl combine the coffee with sweetened condensed milk.
Whisk in the half and half cream until well blended.
Divide into 2 large ice-filled glasses.
Top with whipped cream.
Enjoy!

name: Hot Russian
directions: Pour Vodka into a shot glass.
add 2-3 drops of Soy Sauce.
Pinch of Cayene Pepper (.
**Caution the more of these that you drink, the more Cayene Pepper usually ends up in the glass, besides the hangover, your butt might rebell against you in the morning***.

similar.name: White Russian Drink - Very Low Fat

name: Irish Cream
directions: add ingredients in blender.
blend on high until frothy.
pour into desired container.
chill overnight (the flavors come out the more they sit).
serve over ice or in coffee.

name: Parisan Warm Chocolate
directions: Simmer the milk, cream and sugar together until just below boiling.
Stir in the chocolate until melted.
Serve warm in demitasse cups.

name: Buttered Almond Coffee
directions: Pour coffee into a heavy mug.
Add remaining ingredients and stir until dissolved.

name: Ginger Ale
directions: Grate the ginger. You want to end up with a cup of grated ginger.  More or less as to your taste.
Make a simple syrup with the ginger.  In a pan on add the water, sugar, and ginger.  Put on medium. Stir well to mix.
Bring to a boil.
Lower heat to a simmer.  Let simmer for 10 - 20 minutes, or until syrupy.
Let cool to room temperature  2 - 3 hours.  (optional, but adds more flavor).
Strain in a fine mesh strainer.
Keep in frig.
Add 1/4 cup syrup to 1 cup club soda, or mix full batch with 2 liters.  I mix syrup and soda for each glass served.
Mix and serve with ice.

name: Cubanito - Cuban Bloody Mary
directions: Place all the ingredients except the garnishes in a chilled tall glass and stir. granish with teh celery stick, lime wedge, and cilantro sprig and serve.

name: Sara's Perfect Margarita
directions: Place lime juice, lemon juice, and sugar in the blender. Blend for 2 minutes, to dissolve all the sugar.
Add tequila, and fill jug with ice cubes. Blend until ice is crushed.
Dip the rim of a glass in the jug, then dip it in salt. Fill the glass with your drink, and enjoy! :).
I keep the jug in the freezer, and give it a quick whizz on the blender each time before I pour a new glass.

name: Copenhagen
directions: Mix ingredients in a highball glass two-thirds full of ice.
Enjoy.

name: The Mojito Coco
directions: Muddle the mint with the lime juice in a cocktail shaker.
Add rum, syrup and coconut cream, and shake well with ice.
Strain into tall glasses and top off with club soda.
Garnish with extra mint leaves.

name: Cinnamon Rum Latte, Diabetic
directions: Place all dry syrup ingredients in a saucepan and wisk to incorporate.
Add the water, rum and lemon juice and wisk again.
Heat till thickened while whisking and remove from heat shortly after it begins to bubble.
When syrup is made add 1 oz (or to taste) to your cup.
Add coffee and mix.
Add milk to taste and stir or froth milk for top.
Enjoy.

similar.name: Low-Cal Iced Coffee With Milk (Cafe Au Lait)
Hot Buttered Rum Coffee - Non Alcoholic

name: Rattlesnake Margarita (Like Texas Roadhouse)
directions: Shake all ingredients together in a tin.
Serve on the rocks (use plenty of ice) in salted or sugared margarita glass.
Sit back, relax and enjoy this yummy drink!

name: Bloody Mary & Shrimp
directions: Shake V8, horseradish, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, Tapatio/Tabasco, celery seed, salt, pepper and vodka in a large glass jar with a tight-fitting lid. Mix well and chill.
Shrimp: in a small saucepan, heat wine, lemon juice and red pepper flakes.
Bring to a boil, then reduce to a simmer.
Poach shrimp just until pink and curled, about 3 to 4 minutes.
Place on ice and refrigerate.
When completely chilled, season lightly with salt and serve with bloody mary.
Fill two tall glasses with ice and divide the Bloody Mary between the glasses. Garnish each drink with 2 shrimp on short skewers. Add Celery and a thick Lemon Wedge to garnish.

name: Southern Sunshine Cocktail
directions: In pitcher, combine juices and sugar; stir until sugar dissolves. Cover; chill.
Just before serving, add lemon-lime soda and Southern Comfort. Serve over ice.

name: Alcoholic Purple Passion
directions: In pitcher, combine all ingredients except ice, grapes and mint; stir until sugar dissolves. Cover; chill.
Serve over ice; garnish with grapes and mint if desired.

name: V&b Vodka Water
directions: Simple Syrup:
Bring water to a boil in a small saucepan.
Pour in sugar. Stir until sugar is completely dissolved.
Remove saucepan from heat and allow contents to cool.
Refrigerate in a sealed container until ready for use.
Vodka Water:
Place ice cubes in an empty pitcher.
squeeze juice of the orange, lime and lemon over the ice. (I use my juicer - this gives you more citrus juice) cut peel into quarters and throw in the citrus --  It just gets better.
Add Ruby Red Grapefruit Vodka (1/3 of the bottle is how I do it).
Fill with Water, add 1/2 cup to 1 cup simple syrup (depending on sweet desire) and stir.
Pour into highball glasses with or without ice.

name: Apple-Cinnamon Cappuccino
directions: In a 12-ounce cup, combine syrups and espresso.
Fill cup with steamed milk, top with foamed milk and sprinkle with cinnamon.
Serve immediately.

name: Alcoholic Tea
directions: In a highball glass filled with ice add whiskey, triple sec, sour mix, and cola.
Stir well and garnish with a lemon slice, serve immediately.

name: Basic Sweet Tea (Green Tea)
directions: Put the ice aside in a container or pitcher that can withstand the hot tea without breaking and put it in the fridge while you're brewing.

Heat the 40 oz. of water in a pot, but not to a boil.  It should be able to produce steam, but should not be boiling (boiling water overbrews green tea).  Place the teabags in the hot water, and allow them to brew for 1 to 2 minutes while maintaining the current heat (hot but not boiling).  Do not let the tea brew too long or it will end up too bitter.

Remove the tea bags from the pot, remove the pot from the heat and stir in the cup of cane sugar.  It will dissolve almost instantly into the tea.  Allow it to stand for a minute as your retrieve the container/pitcher.

Carefully pour the brewed tea into the container.  It will melt most of the ice instantly, evening out the temperature so that the tea does not damage the container.  Chill the tea further before serving.

name: Basic Sweet Tea (Black Tea)
directions: Put the ice aside in a container or pitcher that can withstand the hot tea without breaking and put it in the fridge while you're brewing.

Bring the 40 oz. of water to a boil in a pot.  Place the teabags in the boiling water, and allow them to brew for 2 to 3 minutes while the water boils.  When the water has brewed to an oily, reddish-brown, appearance (after 2 to 3 minutes).

Remove the tea bags from the pot, remove the pot from the heat and stir in the cup of cane sugar.  It will dissolve almost instantly into the tea.  Allow it to stand for a minute as your retrieve the container/pitcher.

Carefully pour the brewed tea into the container.  It will melt most of the ice instantly, evening out the temperature so that the tea does not damage the container.  Chill the tea further before serving.

name: Limon Splash
directions: Pour the ingredients in a cocktail shaker with ice.
Shake well.
Strain into a sour or highball glass.
Shake your booty!
Enjoy.

name: Applebee's Lemonade
directions: Mix first three togther.
Fill a tall glass 2/3 to 3/4 with Lemon mixture then fill with sparkling water.
An interesting variation is to puree some fruit (raspberries, strawberries, etc.) with a little superfine or powdered sugar and put that in the glass before adding the the lemonade and water.

name: Cranberry Vodka Iced Tea
directions: Bring the water to a boil in a large pot, and remove from the heat. Immediately whisk in the sugar and lime juice until sugar is dissolved.
Add the tea bags and cranberry juice. Allow the tea to steep for 10 minutes, remove the tea bags and cool the tea.
Stir to be sure that the sugar is dissolved, and place in a large pitcher. Refrigerate until thoroughly chilled.
Just before serving, add the vodka to the tea and serve in tall glasses filled with ice. Garnish with lime slices.

name: Heaven in a Cup Hot Chocolate
directions: Mix salt and chocolate-flavor Nestle Nesquik powder together in a large cup.
Heat milk for 1 minute in the microwave on High.
Add dry ingredients to the milk. Add vanilla and Hershey's syrup,.
Add mini marshmallows if desired.
Heat in microwave for 15 seconds if cold.
Top with whipped cream and serve.

name: Raspberry Iced Tea
directions: Fill Coffee maker with water to 12 cups.
Put all 5 tea bags in bottom of pot.
Brew the water.
Shut warming plate off and allow pot to steep 5 minutes with teas bags in it.
Remove tea bags.
Pour into 2 quart sized pitcher.
Add enough water to fill to 2 quarts.
Add 1 tub of Crystal Light to pitcher and stir.
Refrigerate until cold or serve over ice when ready to enjoy.
If you like to garnish, add fresh raspberries to each glass and maye a thin slice of lemon.

name: Danlex
directions: Fill a sling glass to the rim with ice cubes. Pour absolut ruby red, amaretto, cranberry syrup, orange juice and peach bitters into a shaker. Fill the shaker with ice cubes and shake it until the shaker is very cold.
Strain the drink into the sling glass.
Garnish with an orange.

name: Tainted Love
directions: Chill a highball glass with ice or in the freezer.
Pour absolut peppar, absolut ruby red, cranberry juice and lime juice into a shaker. Fill the shaker with ice cubes and shake it until the shaker is very cold.
Empty the highball glass from ice and water. Strain the drink into the highball glass. Garnish with a lime (wedge).

name: Red Passion Colada
directions: Place ingredients in blender with ice and blend.
Pour into tall glass.
You can also float a little Alize' on top.

name: Squeeze
directions: Pour Absolut Citron, orange juice and pineapple juice over ice in a tall glass.
Top with Chambord.
Enjoy!

name: Vegan Mexican Hot Chocolate
directions: In a small saucepan, whisk together the cocoa powder, sugar, cinnamon, cayenne, and salt and then whisk in the soy milk.
Place over medium heat and bring to a boil. Remove from the heat and whisk in the vanilla.
Divide the mixture between two cups and serve hot.

name: Appleberry Juice
directions: fill glass with ice.
add 2 oz blueberry (more or less depending how strong u want it).
add apple juice to fill and mix!

similar.name: The Recipe (From the Baldwin Sisters on Walton's Mountain)

name: Mocha Shot
directions: Add ingredients to a shot glass.
Enjoy!

name: Pink Mocha Martini
directions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker half-filled with ice, shake and strain into a chilled martini glass.
For more dramatic appearance, keep Chambord separate and pour in slowly at end - it will settle to the bottom.
Enjoy!

name: Ruby
directions: Fill a glass full with ice, pour desired amount of Absolut Ruby Red Vodka, add Fresca, leave some space for cranberry juice.

name: Filthy Martini
directions: Combine vodka, brine, and vermouth in a cocktail shaker filled with ice.
Let it sit for about 30 seconds or just until well chilled.
Pour into a chilled martini glass and garnish with one caper.

name: Raspberry Long Island Ice Tea
directions: Combine all ingredients in a pitcher, top off with water and stir. Service over ice with just a splash of cola.

similar.name: Long Island Iced Tea (Applebee's/TGI Friday's style)

name: Hot Buttered Bourbon and Cider
directions: Bring the first 5 ingredients to a simmer in a medium saucepan.  Remove from heat; cover and let steep for about 5 minutes.
Add 2 T. chilled butter to saucepan; bring to a simmer.  Remove from heat.
Stir in bourbon and lemon juice.  Strain into a large measuring cup.
Divide hot cider among 4 mugs.  Cut 1 T. butter into 4 pieces.  Add 1 piece to each mug.  Sprinkle nutmeg over.

name: Caravella Cooler
directions: Fill a tall glass with ice. Add Caravella and top with cranberry juice. Garnish with lime wedge, if desired.
Enjoy.

name: California Iced Tea
directions: Shake in a cocktail shaker and strain into a pretty glass.
Garnish with an orange slice.

similar.name: Long Island Iced Tea (Applebee's/TGI Friday's style)

name: Crazy Mambo
directions: Mix all the ingredients into a shaker filled with ice.
Pour into a glass.
garnish with a strawberry, if desired.
Enjoy!

name: Fabulously Frothy Hot Chocolate
directions: Pour about 200ml of milk into your microwave safe bowl. Put it in the microwave on high for 2 minutes.
Get your favourite mug out. Fill it with the 3 teaspoons Milo & the sugar.
Mix it together using a teaspoon.
When milk has become warm, whisk it (using the whisk of course!) immediately. You should notice a frothy layer of milk forming at the top.
Pour the hot milk (with exception of froth) directly into the mug from the bowl. All the milk that is not frothy should automatically pour into the cup.
By this stage, you should have the milk froth left in your bowl. Before you do anything else, mix the Milo and hot milk together in the cup.
Using a spoon, scoop out the froth from the bowl and layer it on top of your Milo Hot choccie. The amount of froth and how fluffy it turns out depends on how well you have whisked the hot milk.
Now, sprinkle a little bit of extra Milo or cocoa powder on top of the froth, and let it sit for about a minute.
Your hot chocolate is ready. Sip it. Spoon it. Lick it. Yum.
ENJOY!

name: Tequila Toddy
directions: In a heated coffee mug mix first three ingredients. Top off with hot water until you like the taste.  Garnish with a lime wheel and a cinnamon stick.

name: Simple Southern Lime Martini
directions: Pour ingredients over ice in a shaker.
Shake Shake Shake!
Pour into chilled/frosty martini glass.
Garnish with lime, if desired,  slice then serve.

name: Nutty Colada
directions: Blend all ingredients together with 1/2 cup ice.  Add more ice as you wish.

name: Cocktail Team
directions: Fill a rocks glass to the rim with ice cubes.
Pour absolut kurant, lemon juice and simple syrup over the ice.

name: Prickly Pear Martini
directions: Chill a martini glass in the freezer.
Pour vodka, apple juice and grenadine into a shaker. Fill the shaker with ice cubes and shake it until the shaker is very cold.
Strain the drink into the martini glass and serve.

name: Hot Buttered Rum Coffee  (Nonalcoholic)
directions: Stir together the  Instant Coffee Crystals with the boiling water until dissolved.
Stir in the butterscotch topping and rum extract to mix well.
Top with the whipped topping.
Serve immediately.

similar.name: Hot Buttered Rum Coffee - Non Alcoholic

name: Indian Chai Iced Coffee
directions: In a saucepan, add ginger, cloves, anise and cardamom to the cups of water.
Break the cinnamon stick and add it to the mixture.
Heat over medium heat until the water boils, then reduce the heat to a simmer and cook for about 15 minutes.
Add the coffee, stir, and let steep, off the heat, for about 5 minutes.
Using a fine meshed filter or cheesecloth, pour the coffee through and into a bowl.

Pour the strained coffee into a clean saucepan and add the honey, sugar and milk and heat almost to boiling then remove the pan from the heat, pour into a heat-proof pitcher, cool then refrigerate until it is chilled, about 2 hours.
To serve, add ice to squat glasses, pour on the chai coffee, and enjoy. Recipes easily doubles.

similar.name: Chai Tea the Simple, Quick, and Delicious Way!

name: Rich Raspberry Hot Chocolate
directions: Whisk together in small saucepan over low heat until hot.

name: Pink Fairy
directions: Mix Vodka, Bacardi and Malibu together over ice, top up with lemonade and add a dash of blackcurrant to colour the drink a pale pink.

name: Slow Cooker Hot Chocolate
directions: Combine skim milk powder, water. and cocoa.
Stir until smooth in  crock pot.
Cook on low for 3 - 4 hours.
Spoon into mugs.
Serve using additional ingredients.

similar.name: Hot Chocolate With Skim Milk, Cocoa Powder and Maple Syrup

name: Cafe Caribe
directions: Blend ingredients well.
